name: Sassy Spinach Soup
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Frozen, chopped Spinach, thawed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart saucepan, sauté onion and garlic in butter or margarine until onion is golden, about 5 minutes.
2. Add water and bouillon cubes. Bring mixture to a boil; stir to dissolve the bouillion cubes.
3. Add noodle flakes or broken thin noodles slowly, ensuring the water continues to boil.
4. Add salt. Cook uncovered until the noodles are tender, about 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Squeeze spinach to remove excess water. Stir spinach into the noodle mixture and cook an additional 5 minutes.
6. Stir in milk, Cheddar cheese, Swiss cheese, and pepper. Continue stirring over medium-high heat until cheeses are melted. Do not boil.
